title: [Comb] Canonicalize `a == n | a != n` into `1`.
body:
```
hw.module @Top(%tag: i4, %in: i4) -> (out: i1) {
  %c0_i4 = hw.constant 0 : i4
  %0 = comb.icmp bin ne %tag, %c0_i4 : i4
  %1 = comb.icmp bin eq %tag, %c0_i4 : i4
  %2 = comb.or %1, %0 : i1
  hw.output %2 : i1
}
```

The current output:
```
 assign out = tag == 4'h0 | (|tag);
```

we can optimize into:
```
 assign out = 1'h1;
```

similarly we can optimize 
* `a < n | a >= n` -> `1`
* `a == n & a != n` -> `0`
